highlight.title: Highlight Row
highlight.description: Render the value in the primary accent color

align.title: Header Alignment
align.description: Horizontal alignment of the section header (badge, title, subtitle). When omitted, the section variant decides.

flag.title: Show Flag Bar
flag.description: Render a small country flag accent bar (144x3px, using the theme navLogoFlag stripe colors) below the title.

blogSlug.title: Blog Slug (links to a blog-standalone post shown after service details)

sectionId.title: Shared Section ID (used when type is ref)

blogSlug.title: Blog Slug (used when type is blog-standalone)

blogSlugs.title: Blog Slugs (filter — when type is blog, render only these blogs in the given order; supports standalone blogs)

backgroundColor.title: Section Background Color Override (custom CSS color, e.g. '#26201c')
backgroundColor.description: Overrides the section wrapper background color with a custom CSS color value. Takes precedence over the 'background' enum for the background fill.

cardBackgroundColor.title: Card Background Color Override (custom CSS color, e.g. '#26201c')
cardBackgroundColor.description: Overrides the background color of the section's inner card/panel (e.g. the quote panel in the about 'quote-split' variant). Full CSS color value.

contentAlign.title: Overlay Content Alignment
contentAlign.description: Horizontal placement of the overlaid text in the about 'quote-split' image-overlay layout (when 'image' is set). 'right' (default) anchors the copy to the right side of the photo; 'left' to the left.

imageRounded.title: Round Image Corners
imageRounded.description: When false, renders the section image with square (un-rounded) corners. Defaults to true (rounded).

contentFontFamily.title: Body Content Font Family Override
contentFontFamily.description: Overrides the font-family of the section's main body/story text (the 'big text' content). Full CSS font-family value, e.g. "'DM Sans', sans-serif".

contentFontSize.title: Body Content Font Size Override
contentFontSize.description: Overrides the font-size of the section's main body/story text content. Full CSS length value, e.g. '18px', '1.125rem'.

imageWidth.title: Section Image Width Override
imageWidth.description: Overrides the about-section image width. Full CSS length value, e.g. '560px'. Defaults to 448px.

imageHeight.title: Section Image Height Override
imageHeight.description: Overrides the about-section image height. Full CSS length value, e.g. '620px'. Defaults to 500px.

imageBlend.title: Image Blend Effect
imageBlend.description: Integrates the about-section image with the page instead of a floating shadowed card. 'feather' softly fades the image edges into the background; 'soft' replaces the hard drop shadow with a large low-opacity ambient shadow. Omit for the legacy shadowed-card look.

imageBorder.title: Image Text-Color Border Mat
imageBorder.description: When true (about 'story' variant), wraps the image in an almost-transparent border tinted with the page text color, inset by a small padding mat so the background shows between the image and the border. Replaces the floating drop shadow.

imageMeta.title: Image Card Label
imageMeta.description: Small mono uppercase label rendered above the image card (project 'caseStudyFlow' variant), e.g. '02 · Gotowa strona'.

imageDescription.title: Image Caption Overlay
imageDescription.description: Optional two-line caption overlaid on the bottom-left corner of the about-section image (about 'story' variant): a small name line plus an italic description line, left-aligned with 20px/24px padding.

name.title: Name Line
name.description: First line — small name/title. Defaults to 12px DM Sans.

description.title: Description Line
description.description: Second line — italic subtitle. Defaults to 18px Cormorant Garamond.

color.title: Text Color
color.description: Overlay text color. Full CSS color value, e.g. '#f0ebdb'.

nameFontFamily.title: Name Font Family
nameFontFamily.description: Overrides the name line font-family. Full CSS font-family value.

descriptionFontFamily.title: Description Font Family
descriptionFontFamily.description: Overrides the description line font-family. Full CSS font-family value.

scrollColor.title: Hero Scroll Indicator Color Override
scrollColor.description: Overrides the color of the hero scroll indicator label and chevron (default hero-fold variant). Custom CSS color value, e.g. '#f0ebdb'.

textColor.title: Hero Text Color Override
textColor.description: Overrides the color of the hero title and subtitle text (default hero-fold variant). Custom CSS color value, e.g. '#f0ebdb'.

titleDividerColor.title: Hero Title Divider Color
titleDividerColor.description: When set, renders a thin horizontal divider line directly under the hero title (default hero-fold variant), in this color. Custom CSS color value, e.g. '#f0ebdb'.

imageFrame.title: Hero Image Frame
imageFrame.description: When false, removes the inset picture-frame line drawn around the hero background image (default hero-fold variant). Defaults to true (frame shown).

overlayColor.title: Hero Overlay Color Override
overlayColor.description: Overrides the dark overlay drawn over the hero background image across the whole image (default hero-fold variant). Higher opacity = darker image. Full CSS color value, e.g. 'rgba(20,17,15,0.6)' or 'color-mix(in oklab, hsl(24 15% 10%) 60%, transparent)'. Defaults to a 40% dark overlay.

mapPanelButtonColor.title: Map Panel Button Color
mapPanelButtonColor.description: Color for the action buttons (directions, open in maps) inside the custom map overlay panel. Defaults to 'primary-light'.

headerLineColor.title: Header Decorative Line Color
headerLineColor.description: Color of the decorative line in the section header (e.g. ContactProfessional title block). Defaults to 'foreground'.

statsInverted.title: Invert stat colors (light bg, dark text)

socialCta.title: Social CTA (ghost button)
socialCta.description: A ghost-style link rendered below the gallery grid (e.g. 'FOLLOW US on instagram @handle'). The full text is shown uppercase; the 'highlight' substring within it is rendered in 'highlightColor'.

highlight.title: Highlight Substring
highlight.description: A substring of 'text' rendered in the highlight color (e.g. a social handle).

columns.title: Services Column Count
columns.description: Number of columns for the services list/grid layout. Defaults to 1 (single column) for the list variant.

footnote.title: Section Footnote
footnote.description: Supplementary text rendered in italic below the section content (e.g. below the services list).

pills.title: Pill Tags
pills.description: Plain-text pill labels rendered below the section content (e.g. additional industries in the templateShowcase 'browser' variant).

maxWidth.title: Section Max Width Override
maxWidth.description: Constrains the section content container to a maximum width. Full CSS length value, e.g. '976px'. Overrides the default responsive container max-widths.

titleAccent.title: Title Accent
titleAccent.description: Decorative italic phrase rendered as a secondary line under the main title (used by hero/sacrum).

scheduleCards.title: Schedule Cards
scheduleCards.description: Compact data cards (e.g. mass hours, confession hours) rendered inside the hero (used by hero/sacrum).

meta.title: Meta Note
meta.description: Short note shown top-right of an event card (e.g. 'Limited seats').

category.title: Category
category.description: ID of the serviceCategories tab this item belongs to. When the section defines serviceCategories, only items matching the active tab are shown.

orderable.title: Orderable
orderable.description: When true, this menu item can be added to the cart and ordered online. Requires priceValue.

priceValue.title: Price (number)
priceValue.description: Numeric price (e.g. 23.5 for 23,50 zł) — used for cart pricing. Required when orderable is true.

serviceCategories.title: Service Category Tabs
serviceCategories.description: Optional tabs shown between the section header and the services list. Selecting a tab shows only the items whose category matches the tab id.

categoryGroups.title: Category Groups
categoryGroups.description: Optional groups that aggregate multiple serviceCategories into a single top-level tab. A group with showSubTabs:true renders a second tab row for its constituent categories; without it, items from all constituent categories are shown merged.

showSubTabs.title: Show Sub-Tabs
showSubTabs.description: When true, selecting this group tab reveals a second row of sub-tabs for each constituent category.

defaultCategory.title: Default Category Tab
defaultCategory.description: Optional id of the serviceCategories tab (or categoryGroups group) selected by default when the page loads. When omitted, the first tab is selected.

categoryImages.title: Category Tab Images
categoryImages.description: Optional per-tab images for the services 'list' variant. When present, the section renders a two-column split: tabs + single-column items on the left, and a bordered image with a bottom-left caption overlay on the right. Selecting a tab cross-reveals the matching image. Each entry's id matches a serviceCategories tab id or a categoryGroups group id.

id.title: Tab/Group ID
id.description: Matches a serviceCategories tab id or a categoryGroups group id.

imageDescription.title: Image Caption Overlay
imageDescription.description: Two-line caption overlaid on the bottom-left corner of the image: a small name line plus an italic description line.

signature.title: Signature Row
signature.description: Optional row rendered below the about story content: a small country flag (26x24px) plus an uppercase tagline. The flag defaults to the theme navLogoFlag gradient when no flag image is provided.

flag.title: Flag Image URL
flag.description: Optional. When omitted, the theme navLogoFlag gradient is used.

quote.title: Quote Panel
quote.description: Right-side quote panel for the about "quote-split" variant: a small flag accent, an italic quote, an author line, a divider, a note paragraph and (via the section cta) a call to action.

text.title: Quote Text
text.description: Rendered as an italic blockquote with curly quotes.

author.title: Author
author.description: Rendered in uppercase below the quote.

flag.title: Flag Image URL
flag.description: Optional. When omitted, the theme navLogoFlag gradient bar is used.

note.title: Note Paragraph
note.description: Optional paragraph rendered below a divider.

googlePlaceQuery.title: Google Place Query
googlePlaceQuery.description: Business name/address query for the embedded contact map (e.g. 'Restauracja Nostrano, Garwolin'). When set, the map resolves to Google's native place listing showing reviews/opinions instead of a plain address pin.

hoursDetailed.title: Detailed Hours
hoursDetailed.description: Per-day opening hours, one line each (e.g., 'poniedziałek 9:00 – 15:00'). Rendered as a multi-line block under the single 'hours' line.

receptionLabel.title: Reception Label
receptionLabel.description: Localized label for the reception hours block (e.g., 'Client reception'). Rendered above receptionHours.

additionalInfo.title: Additional Info
additionalInfo.description: Extra contact info lines (e.g., bank account, EPUAP address).

notice.title: Contact Notice
notice.description: Highlighted notice block displayed below the contact info (e.g., bank transfer instructions).

warning.title: Contact Warning
warning.description: Temporary warning/alert shown prominently above the contact info (e.g. office closure on a given day). Plain text.

clientLogos.title: Client Logos
clientLogos.description: Logo images for scrolling trust bar

criteria.title: Comparison Criteria
criteria.description: Row labels for the comparison 'triple' variant. Each comparisonColumns entry provides one value per criterion (values[i] aligns with criteria[i]).

comparisonColumns.title: Comparison Columns
comparisonColumns.description: Columns for the comparison 'triple' variant. The highlighted column is rendered as an elevated card with a primary header block and check-prefixed values.

badge.title: Badge Pill (shown on the highlighted column header)

accent.title: Accent Color
accent.description: Optional CSS color for the card's browser-chrome header bar (templateShowcase 'browser' variant). Defaults to the theme foreground.

pricingLayout.title: Pricing Layout
pricingLayout.description: Pricing card layout override. 'left' = left-aligned cards, primary tier names, divided feature rows (PricingDefault). Omit for centered.

testimonialsClean.title: Testimonials Clean Cards
testimonialsClean.description: Agency testimonials variant: render clean white cards without stars/verified-badge/metric.

gradient.title: Gradient Surface
gradient.description: Optional surface tint used as the top stop of light-padded section gradients.

footerIcon.title: Footer Icon URL
footerIcon.description: Icon used in the footer. Falls back to icon when absent.

iconLucide.title: Icon Lucide Name
iconLucide.description: Lucide icon name rendered inline with text-primary color (e.g. 'scale', 'gavel'). Takes precedence over icon.

additionalInfo.title: Additional Info
additionalInfo.description: Extra info strings shown next to phone/email/address in the navbar upper bar, each rendered with an 'i' info icon (e.g., registration numbers, license IDs).

googlePlaceQuery.title: Google Place Query
googlePlaceQuery.description: Business name/address query for Google Maps native panel (e.g. 'Kancelaria Notarialna Garwolin'). When set, the map shows Google's native info card with reviews and directions instead of the custom overlay.

contentWidth.title: Content Width
contentWidth.description: Max width of the centered content container (e.g. "1200px" or "1488px"). Defaults to 1200px when unset.

servicesListDivider.title: Services List Divider Style
servicesListDivider.description: For the services "list" variant: drop the card border/shadow/radius and show only a bottom divider (surface.card at 50% opacity).

servicesNotClickable.title: Services Not Clickable
servicesNotClickable.description: Make service list/grid items non-interactive (no link navigation, no hover affordance).

servicesMaxWidth.title: Services Section Max Width
servicesMaxWidth.description: Cap the services section content width (e.g. "848px"). Centered within the page container. Unset = full container width.

servicesMenuStyle.title: Services Menu Style
servicesMenuStyle.description: For the services "list" variant: render as a restaurant-style menu — drop the price pill, right-align the price, and apply the servicesTitle/Desc/Price/Footnote font + size overrides.

servicesTitleFontFamily.title: Services Item Title Font Family
servicesTitleFontFamily.description: CSS font-family for service item titles when servicesMenuStyle is on, e.g. "'Cormorant Garamond', serif". The font is automatically loaded.

servicesTitleSize.title: Services Item Title Font Size
servicesTitleSize.description: Font size for service item titles when servicesMenuStyle is on, e.g. "18px".

servicesDescFontFamily.title: Services Item Description Font Family
servicesDescFontFamily.description: CSS font-family for service item descriptions when servicesMenuStyle is on, e.g. "'DM Sans', sans-serif". The font is automatically loaded.

servicesDescSize.title: Services Item Description Font Size
servicesDescSize.description: Font size for service item descriptions when servicesMenuStyle is on, e.g. "14px".

servicesPriceFontFamily.title: Services Item Price Font Family
servicesPriceFontFamily.description: CSS font-family for service item prices when servicesMenuStyle is on, e.g. "'Cormorant Garamond', serif". The font is automatically loaded.

servicesPriceSize.title: Services Item Price Font Size
servicesPriceSize.description: Font size for service item prices when servicesMenuStyle is on, e.g. "16px".

servicesFootnoteFontFamily.title: Services Footnote Font Family
servicesFootnoteFontFamily.description: CSS font-family for the services section footnote when servicesMenuStyle is on, e.g. "'DM Sans', sans-serif". The font is automatically loaded.

servicesFootnoteSize.title: Services Footnote Font Size
servicesFootnoteSize.description: Font size for the services section footnote when servicesMenuStyle is on, e.g. "14px".

servicesCtaHideIcon.title: Services CTA Hide Icon
servicesCtaHideIcon.description: Hide the arrow icon inside the services section CTA button.

maxFontWeight.title: Max Font Weight
maxFontWeight.description: Caps the maximum font-weight used anywhere on the site (e.g. "400" forces all text to weight 400 or lower).

paragraphMaxWeight.title: Paragraph Max Font Weight
paragraphMaxWeight.description:
Optional cap applied specifically to body paragraphs. When set, every

(and any weight-utility inside it) is clamped to this weight (e.g. "300") so paragraph copy never renders heavier than the design intends. Capped by maxFontWeight. Absent → no paragraph-specific cap.

navLogoUppercase.title: Navbar Logo Uppercase
navLogoUppercase.description: Render the navbar logo text in uppercase.

navLogoFont.title: Navbar Logo Font
navLogoFont.description: Which theme font the navbar logo text uses: "body" (typography.primary) or "heading" (typography.secondary).

navLogoFontFamily.title: Navbar Logo Font Family
navLogoFontFamily.description: Explicit CSS font-family for the navbar logo text, e.g. "'Cormorant Garamond', serif". Overrides navLogoFont. The font is automatically loaded.

navLogoColor.title: Navbar Logo Color
navLogoColor.description: Fixed color for the navbar logo text (hex). Hover lightens it slightly. Overrides the default foreground/transparent behavior.

navLinkColor.title: Navbar Link Color
navLinkColor.description: Fixed color for the navbar links (hex). Hover lightens it slightly. Overrides the default foreground/transparent behavior.

navLinksUppercase.title: Navbar Links Uppercase
navLinksUppercase.description: Render the navbar links (desktop + mobile) in uppercase.

navLogoLetterSpacing.title: Navbar Logo Letter Spacing
navLogoLetterSpacing.description: Letter spacing for the navbar logo text, e.g. "0.05em". Overrides the default normal spacing.

navCtaHideIcon.title: Navbar CTA Hide Icon
navCtaHideIcon.description: Hide the icon (arrow/clock) inside the navbar CTA button.

navLogoBadge.title: Navbar Logo Badge
navLogoBadge.description: Render the navbar logo icon inside a rounded-square tinted (primary) badge with a whitened glyph.

navCtaUppercase.title: Navbar CTA Uppercase
navCtaUppercase.description: Render the navbar CTA button text (desktop + mobile) in uppercase.

heroCtaHideIcon.title: Hero CTA Hide Icon
heroCtaHideIcon.description: Hide the arrow icon inside the hero section CTA button.

heroTextThemeColors.title: Hero Text Uses Theme Colors
heroTextThemeColors.description: Use theme text colors for the hero title (text.main) and subtitle (text.muted) instead of the on-image white default.

heroBottomFade.title: Hero Bottom Fade
heroBottomFade.description: Fade the hero background image into the page background color, from the vertical middle down to the bottom edge.

heroTitleSize.title: Hero Title Font Size
heroTitleSize.description: Font size for the hero title. Any CSS length, e.g. "96px" or a responsive "clamp(3.5rem, 7vw, 6rem)". Overrides the default responsive sizing.

heroTitleFontFamily.title: Hero Title Font Family
heroTitleFontFamily.description: Explicit CSS font-family for the hero title text, e.g. "'Cormorant Garamond', serif". Overrides the default heading font. The font is automatically loaded.

heroSubtitleSize.title: Hero Subtitle Font Size
heroSubtitleSize.description: Font size for the hero subtitle/description, e.g. "24px". Overrides the default responsive sizing.

heroBadgeLetterSpacing.title: Hero Badge Letter Spacing
heroBadgeLetterSpacing.description: Letter spacing for the hero badge/eyebrow text, e.g. "0.4em". Overrides the default 0.05em.

heroSubtitleLetterSpacing.title: Hero Subtitle Letter Spacing
heroSubtitleLetterSpacing.description: Letter spacing for the hero subtitle/description text, e.g. "0.15em". Overrides the default 0.05em.

heroTitleLetterSpacing.title: Hero Title Letter Spacing
heroTitleLetterSpacing.description: Letter spacing for the hero title text, e.g. "0.01em" or "-0.02em". Overrides the default 0.04em.

navLinkLetterSpacing.title: Navbar Link Letter Spacing
navLinkLetterSpacing.description: Letter spacing for the navbar links (desktop + mobile), e.g. "0.1em". Overrides the default normal spacing.

buttonLetterSpacing.title: Button Letter Spacing
buttonLetterSpacing.description: Letter spacing applied to CTA buttons (primary/default variant), ghost buttons, and the navbar CTA, e.g. "0.1em". Overrides the default normal spacing.

badgeWeight.title: Badge Font Weight
badgeWeight.description: Font weight applied to all badges/eyebrows site-wide, e.g. "500". Overrides the per-component default weight.

badgeLetterSpacing.title: Badge Letter Spacing
badgeLetterSpacing.description: Letter spacing applied to all badges/eyebrows site-wide, e.g. "0.1em". Overrides the per-component default spacing.

navLogoFlag.title: Navbar Logo Flag Stripes
navLogoFlag.description: Optional flag bar rendered beneath the navbar logo text. Provide the stripe colors left-to-right (e.g. Italian flag: ["#008C45", "#F4F5F0", "#CD212A"]).

navHeightTop.title: Navbar Height At Top
navHeightTop.description: Navbar height when scrolled to the very top (e.g. "86px"). Animates to navHeightScrolled once the solid background appears. Requires navbar variant "transparent".

navHeightScrolled.title: Navbar Height When Scrolled
navHeightScrolled.description: Navbar height once the solid background appears on scroll (e.g. "70px").

logoText.title: Logo Text Override
logoText.description: Override the business name displayed in the navbar

logoAccent.title: Logo Accent Text
logoAccent.description: Optional trailing part of the logo name rendered in the primary color (e.g. logoText 'Hazelgrouse' + logoAccent 'Studio')

logoSubtext.title: Logo Subtext
logoSubtext.description: Optional second line shown below the logo text (stacked column layout)

hideLogoIcon.title: Hide Logo Icon
hideLogoIcon.description: Hide the icon next to the logo text in the navbar

hideBorderOnTop.title: Hide Border When At Top
hideBorderOnTop.description: Hide the bottom border when scroll is at the very top of the page

hideCta.title: Hide CTA Button
hideCta.description: Hide the call-to-action button in the navbar

hideBlog.title: Hide Blog Link
hideBlog.description: Hide the auto-injected Blog link in the navbar

showSocials.title: Show Social Media Icons in Extension
showSocials.description: Show social media icons in the upper bar extension

showAvailability.title: Show Availability in Extension
showAvailability.description: Show availability badge in the upper bar extension

showAddress.title: Show Address in Extension
showAddress.description: Show address in the upper bar extension

showAdditionalInfo.title: Show Additional Info in Extension
showAdditionalInfo.description: Show additionalInfo items in the upper bar extension

notice.title: Upper Bar Notice
notice.description: Short warning/announcement shown centered in the upper bar (e.g. temporary office closure). Plain text.

hidePagesColumn.title: Hide Auto Pages Column
hidePagesColumn.description: Suppress the auto-generated 'Strony'/Pages column (nav + footer links) that is otherwise prepended to the footer columns.

tagline.title: Tagline
tagline.description: Footer tagline. Use \n to split across multiple lines.

flag.title: Brand Flag Colors
flag.description: Optional list of hex colors rendered as a segmented accent bar under the logo (e.g. an Italian flag).

findUsTitle.title: Find-Us Column Title
findUsTitle.description: Heading for the address/phone column (restaurant variant).

hoursTitle.title: Opening-Hours Column Title
hoursTitle.description: Heading for the opening-hours column (restaurant variant).

signature.title: Footer Signature
signature.description: Italic signature line shown on the right of the bottom bar (restaurant variant).

color.title: Footer Background Color Override (custom CSS color, e.g. '#26201c')
color.description: Overrides the footer wrapper background with a custom CSS color value. Takes precedence over the variant's default background fill.

postVariant.title: Blog Post Layout
postVariant.description: Layout variant for individual blog post pages

hideBreadcrumbs.title: Hide Breadcrumbs
hideBreadcrumbs.description: Hide breadcrumb navigation on service detail pages

sharedSections.title: Shared Sections
sharedSections.description: Named sections that can be referenced from any page via { type: 'ref', sectionId: '<key>' }

payments.title: Payments
payments.description: Stripe payment configuration used for online orders (restaurants, shops).

fulfillmentTypes.title: Enabled Fulfillment Types
fulfillmentTypes.description: Which fulfillment options are shown at checkout.

prepTimePresets.title: Prep Time Presets (minutes)
prepTimePresets.description: Quick-buttons shown to the admin after payment when setting the ETA.

paymentMethods.title: Enabled Payment Methods
paymentMethods.description: Payment methods offered at checkout. "online" requires Stripe keys; "cash" and "card_on_site" are settled at pickup/delivery/table.

email.title: Contact Form Notification Email
email.description: Override email for receiving contact form submissions. Use when the public contact email (business.contact.email) has delivery issues (e.g. strict government/corporate mail servers). Leave empty to use business.contact.email.

phoneNumber.title: Recipient Phone Number (with country code, e.g. +48500600700)
